name: Patient Case
history: Longstanding difficult interactions with the patient's mother. Strained communication and delayed sharing of significant events within the family.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I don't agree with my mother, I will be rejected.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't change the way things are with my mother.
coping_strategies: Avoids confrontation and agrees to mother's plans to avoid conflict.
situation: Disagreement with mother about weekend plans and financial assistance. The mother covers expenses during the visit.
auto_thought: If I disagree, my mother will reject me.
behavior: Complies with mother's wishes to avoid conflict.
